$description: Component tokens for the Video Player composite component — the full player combining Media (video frame) and Controls (icon buttons, progress bar, time pill). Supports 2 platforms (Android, iOS) and 7 states: Default (centered play button), Playing (progress overlay + corner controls + time), Paused (same layout as Playing but with backward/forward controls replacing caption), buffering/Buffering (buffering spinner overlay), Error (error scrim), and Replay (replay button overlay). Media (928:1814) and Control (928:2150) are nested same-file components — their internal tokens are excluded here. This file only defines VideoPlayer-specific layout values: container, progress overlay positioning/sizing (which differs from the standalone Controls progress variant), corner control insets, and state-specific platform overrides. Figma Reference: Node ID 928-2452

$component.name: Video Player
$component.description: Full mobile video player composing Video Player Media (video frame) and Video Player Controls (icon buttons, progress, time). Fixed 361×233px container. Controls are absolutely positioned at specific insets within the frame depending on state and platform.
$component.structure: Fixed 361×233px container, overflow-clip. Video Player Media fills the frame. Control elements are absolutely positioned as overlays: a centered play/pause button, a bottom progress bar overlay (playing/paused), corner icon buttons (top-right and bottom-right), and a bottom-left time display.

platform.Android: Opaque control surfaces. Progress overlay: white bg with drop-shadow. Corner icon buttons: gray.100 opaque.
platform.iOS: Translucent control surfaces over dark video. Progress overlay: 10% white. Corner icon buttons: 20% gray.100.

state.Default: Centered play button only (no progress bar or corner controls)
state.Playing: Progress overlay (bottom) + center pause + corner controls (top-right: caption/setting, bottom-right: fullscreen) + time pill (bottom-left)
state.Paused: Progress overlay (bottom) + center play + corner controls (left/center/right: backward/play/forward) + fullscreen (bottom-right) + setting (top-right) + caption (top-right) + time pill (bottom-left)
state.buffering: Buffering spinner centered (Media handles the overlay)
state.Error: Error scrim + warning icon + error description pill (Media handles the overlay)
state.Replay: Replay button centered (Media handles the overlay)

nested-components.Media: Node ID 928:1814 — Video Player Media from the same file. Fills the frame; handles buffering/replay/error overlays. Internal tokens in video-player-media.json, excluded here.
nested-components.Control: Node ID 928:2150 — Video Player Controls from the same file. All icon buttons, progress, and time pill. Internal tokens in video-player-controls.json, excluded here.

usage.contexts: Inline video playback in mobile feeds, courses, media library, story previews
usage.features: 7 playback states, Android/iOS platform splits, bottom progress overlay, corner control layout, center play/pause overlay

container.$comment: Outer player container — same dimensions as Media, clips all overlay controls

progress-overlay.$comment: Bottom progress bar overlay shown in Playing and Paused states. Wraps the Controls 'progress' variant. Width and iOS opacity differ from the standalone Controls progress variant (320px / 20%) — these are VideoPlayer-specific overrides.

width.description: Video player progress overlay width in Playing/Paused states - 345px (= container 361px − 8px left inset − 8px right inset). This overrides the standalone Controls progress width of 320px.

horizontal.description: Video player progress overlay horizontal padding - 8px (matches Controls progress variant)

vertical.description: Video player progress overlay vertical padding - 4px (matches Controls progress variant)

radius.description: Video player progress overlay border radius - 16px (matches Controls progress variant)

bottom.description: Video player progress overlay bottom inset from container edge - 8px

left.description: Video player progress overlay left inset from container edge - 8px

android.description: Video player progress overlay background for Android - white - #ffffff (opaque)

ios.description: Video player progress overlay background for iOS - 10% white - rgba(255,255,255,0.1). More subtle than the standalone Controls progress (20%) as it sits over the live video frame.

android.description: Video player progress overlay shadow for Android - 0px 4px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.25). No matching semantic token. iOS has no shadow.

controls.$comment: Positional layout tokens for the absolutely-positioned Control overlays within the Video Player frame. Control internal styling is defined in video-player-controls.json.

edge.description: Video player controls edge inset from container top and right edges - 8px. Used for all corner-anchored control buttons (top-right setting, caption, etc.).

center.$comment: Center play/pause button — positioned at 50% / 50% of the container in Default, Playing, Paused states

horizontal.description: Video player center control horizontal position - 50% of container width (translate -50%)

vertical.description: Video player center control vertical position - 50% of container height (translate -50%)

time.$comment: Time display pill position in Playing/Paused states — bottom-left anchor

left.description: Video player time pill left inset - 8px (bottom-left corner)

top.description: Video player time pill top offset - 169px (= container 233px − 24px pill height − 8px bottom inset − ~32px gap from progress bar bottom)
